description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu (Suiton)

Rank: 5 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 8

Learn DC: 19 | Successes: 5

Perform: 7 | Perform DC: 20

Components: E, F, Mas

Make a melee attack against the target, sending forth a powerful, watery dragon to sweep away your target. The attack deals normal damage, except the damage becomes water damage, and the target must make a save or become stunned for 1 round. This attack cannot score a critical hit.

You can deal 3d6 damage to ignore the water part of the material focus, instead creating a dragon of blood, which deals 1d6 additional damage, and all its damage becomes acid damage. Doing so adds the Acid descriptor to this technique.

Empower: Spend 1 Chakra to increase the damage of the attack by 1d6, up to 1d6 per 2 levels or 5d6 total. If the dragon is a blood dragon, you deal yourself 1 additional die of damage per point of Chakra spent on empowering it.

Mastery: The third step allows you to take no damage when creating a blood dragon.

The fifth step allows you to ignore the damage you would take when empowering this technique.
